title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at FreeCharge Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at FreeCharge Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge Advisory Limited:
FreeCharge Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge Advisory Limited!
